title: Junior Investment Banker at MCX International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at MCX International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
MCX International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Howrah. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MCX International Enterprises:
MCX International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MCX International Enterprises!
